key_finding: V-cache decodes final answer from 3% of chain (V_R=0.335, L18) where text reveals answer to 0% of problems. Early Decodability Gap: 25% (L18) / 80% (L27) of chain. Peak V_R=0.678 (bootstrap CI [0.71,0.89], p<0.001). Text median first-reveal at 95%. 6.5/8 TRUE predictions confirmed. L18>L27 peak (unexpected). Input-number confound noted.
evidence_impact: Phase 2 natural_usage revised from MODERATE to MODERATE-STRONG. Position-sweep decodability curve is the most compelling single visualization. Combined with residualized probing (exp_079/082) and WRRA (exp_078/082), Phase 2 now has 3 independent methodologies.
next_planned: Position-sweep with nums control (visible numbers baseline at each bin). Or cross-model position-sweep on Phi. Or layer-sweep heatmap.

null_space_existence.status: CONFIRMED in K-space (p=0.013). Narrow but real. Qwen-specific.

spatial_structure.status: DECISIVELY DISCONFIRMED for selectivity. HEAD-LEVEL CONCENTRATION decisive on Qwen, weak on Llama.

positional_dissociation.status: Complete. Head x position interaction is encoding-dependent.

geometric_dissociation.status: K > V UNIVERSAL: 8 angles. K spectral geometry uniform across heads. V spectral differentiates.

head_level_analysis.status: COMPLETE + SPECTRAL: Two-regime on Qwen (decisive), near-collapse on Llama.

natural_usage.status: MODERATE-STRONG (revised UP): Position-sweep decodability gap 25-80% (Exp 083); V|nums confirmed on 2 families (Qwen R=0.24, Phi R=0.19); WRRA on 2 families (Phi 87.5%, Qwen 71.4%); V>K for forward-looking. 3 independent methodologies.

cross_model_replication.status: COMPLETE for Phase 1 (4 families). Phase 2: V|nums on 2 families (Qwen, Phi). WRRA on 2 families. Position sweep on Qwen only (needs Phi replication).
